intro.tutorialTitle: Mokgwa wa go Dirisa Tracker Player
intro.tutorialClosing: Itumela go reetsa — mme o itumelele mmino!
intro.tutorialStep3Title: 3. Ponalo e Phela — Tebelelo ya Sebopego le Di-Oscilloscope
intro.tutorialStep5Body: Bopa akhaonto ya mahala go bula dikarolo tse dingwe:
intro.tutorialStep3Body: Tracker Player e tlisa mmino botshelong ka diponagalo tse pedi tsa nako ya nnete tse di tlatsanang:
intro.introWelcome: Tsela ya gago ya go thabela mmino wa tracker ka mefuta e 68+ — go tswa go MOD le XM tse di tumileng go ya go MPTM le UMX tsa segompieno — go tswa mo pokellong e kgolo kwa
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Tracker Player e ka kgona go fetolwa ka tsela e e farologaneng. Tsena mo di-setting ka setshwantsho sa gear (mo godimo) kana ka Settings ear (mo letlhakoreng la molema):
intro.tutorialLead: Kaeletšo ye e go ruta ka dithuto tšohle tša Tracker Player, go tloga go hwetša pina ya gago ya mathomo go fihlela go lokiša sebapadi go ya ka tshebetšo ya gago.
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Ntlha e botlhokwa: Mo go mobile, tsenya Tracker Player mo skrineng sa gago sa ntlo go nna le maitemogelo a jaaka app ya nnete. E dira sentle jaaka Progressive Web App e e nang le offline caching.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: The utility-first CSS framework used for styling. Tailwind's design token system enables our 16-theme architecture — every color, shadow, and border adapts to the active theme through CSS custom properties generated from our Tailwind configuration.
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Pinaelo ke pelo ya Tracker Player. Dirisa sekgala sa go batla kwa godimo go batla dipina ka leina la faele kgotsa setlhogo. Fa tlase ga sekgala sa go batla, o tla bona setlhopha se se maatla sa difilthara:
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Tobetsa pina epe kana mo lethathamong la dipina go simolola go tshameka. Sebapadi se tsena ka bonako — dipina tse dintsi di simolola go tshameka ka fa tlase ga motsotswana. Fa pina e tshameka, o tla bona:
intro.changelogIntro: Tracker Player e fetogile go tswa mo tshimologong ya yone e le sebapadi se se bonolo sa MOD/XM. Fa e le nako ya ditiragalo tse dikgolo:
intro.creditsVueDesc: The progressive JavaScript framework e diriseditswe go e component-based UI ya rona. Vue's Composition API, reactivity system, le single-file components di dirile gore go kgonege go aga le go boloka player interface e thata ka code e phepa, e modular.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Go fitšha ga gompieno, mmino wa tracker o ntse o tswelela go atlega mo setšhabeng sa demoscene sa lefatshe ka bophara le mo go ba ratang dikhomphutha tsa kgale. Tracker Player e solofela go itsise batho ba bangwe ka mokgwa o o kgethegileng wa botaki o o tsamaisang hisetori ya mmino wa khomphutha, ka tsela ya seyalemoya sa segompieno le tirisano e e bonolo.
intro.introWelcomeNote: Tracker Player ke feta fela go tshameka — ke sethala sa mmino wa tracker se se nang le dikarolo tse di feletseng, se se nang le sebopego se se ntle le se se arabelang, ponaletso ya paterone ya nako ya nnete, di-oscilloscope tsa kanale nngwe le nngwe, le setlhopha sa didirisiwa tse di diretsweng go dira gore go sibolla le go natefelwa ke mmino wa tracker go nne bonolo mo sedirisweng sengwe le sengwe.
intro.introWhatBody1: Tracker Player ke porojeke e e bulegilengwe sa botho e e ikaeletseng go tlisa botle ba mmino wa tracker mo browsereng ya segompieno. Ga se enjene ya modumo e e ntshwa, mme ke kopanyo e e tseneletseng le tlhabololo ya bobedi e e agilweng mo godimo ga diporojeke tse di bulegileng tse di gaisang tse di leng teng, e e dirang tsamaiso e e feletseng ya maitemogelo a modirisi.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Pina e mgwe mo go Tracker Player e na le URL e e sa fetogeng, e e ka abelanwang. Kopola kgokagano go tswa mo atereseng ya sebatli sa gago fa pina e ntse e tshameka — e tla bonala jaana /song/123456/filename.mod. E romele ditsala, e tsenye mo go tsa loago, kgotsa e tshwaye gore o e dirise moragonyana. Kgokagano e tla bula pina e e tshwanang ka metlha.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Meta-framework ya Vue.js e e thusang go tsamaisa frontend le backend ya rona yotlhe. Nuxt e fana ka server-side rendering go thusa go tlisa ditsebe ka bonako le SEO, Nitro server bakeng sa ditsela tsa API, kopanyo ya database ya SQLite, le go kgaola khoutu ka go itirisa bakeng sa tiro e e siameng.
intro.introWhatBody3: Go batleng ya go batla le go tlhotlha dipina, go bontsha modumo ka mokgwa wa pono, ditsamaiso tsa diakhaonto tsa modirisi go ya go tshegetso ya dipuo tsa boditšhabatšhaba, Tracker Player e agile tsamaiso e e feletseng ya dikarolo tse di tlatsang go dikologa motheo wa sebapadi, ka maikaelelo a go letla badirisi go itumela botle bo bo kgethegileng ba mmino wa tracker ntle le go nna le kitso ya thekenoloji.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , ke tracker ya Amiga MOD/XM e e dirilweng mo browser, e e kwadilweng ka JavaScript e e itshekileng ke Steffest, e e tsosolosang maitemogelo a tracker a setso ka botshepegi. Go aga mo motheong o, porojeke e e kopantse Chiptune3 (enjini ya WebAssembly e e itlhametsweng e e theilweng mo libopenmpt) le go fetola dikhouto tsa FFmpeg mo lefelong la server, e e oketsang tshegetso ya diforomo go tswa mo MOD/XM ya ntlha go ya go diforomo tse di fetang 68.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: Emscripten ke motšwa wa LLVM e e kopanyang khoutu ya C/C++ go ya go WebAssembly. Re dirisa Emscripten go kopanya libopenmpt ya rona e e patšhilweng — go akaretsa le waveform_processor e e itlhametsweng — go nna module ya WASM ya faele e le nngwe e e dirang ka lobelo lo lo gaufi le la tlholego mo AudioWorklet ya browser.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player e agilwe mo mahetleng a setšhaba se se bulegileng se se gakgamatsang. Mokgobo wa rona wa dipina tse di fetang 135,400 o tswa go The Mod Archive — e leng polokelo ya nnete ya mmino wa tracker mo inthaneteng. Re leboga thata mongwe le mongwe yo o dirileng gore porojeke e e kgonege.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Mmino wa tracker (o itsegeng gape jaaka mmino wa module kgotsa mmino wa MOD) ke mofuta o o kgethegileng wa mmino wa dijithale o o tlhageletseng kwa bokhutlong jwa dingwaga tsa bo 1980 mo Commodore Amiga. Go farologana le di-MP3 kgotsa mmino o o elelang, difaele tsa tracker di na le tlotlomantsho ya mmino (dinoutu, dipaterone, ditlamorago) le disampole tsa didiriswa — jaaka faele ya porojeke ya mmino e e itseng. Se se dira gore difaele tsa tracker di nne tse di kgobokanyang sentle fa di ntse di letla go raragana ga mmino go go gakgamatsang.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: E dirilwe ke Steffest. Go dirisiwa gape ka browser go tswa mo tracker ya classic ya Amiga MOD le XM — ProTracker le FastTracker II — e e kwadilweng ka botlalo ka JavaScript. BassoonTracker e naya modumo wa nnete o o bothitho o o simolodisitseng porojeke eno, ka tshegetso e e feletseng ya di-MOD tsa 4-channel le di-XM tsa multi-channel tse di akaretsang di-envelope, difilter, le di-effect.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: API ya setshwantsho sa go etelela mo go e dirisiwang ke browser e e dirang gore pono ya rona ya paterone ya tracker e nne teng ka nako ya nnete. Datha ya nouta ya paterone e romelwa kwa sejaneng sa WebGL ka 60 fps, e dirang gore pono ya nouta e e kgwelelang e e tshwanang le ya dikgokagano tsa tracker tsa bogologolo tse di jaaka ProTracker le FastTracker II e nne teng ka botlalo.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: Tlhaloso ya W3C Web Audio API e e thusang go dira gore modumo o tsamaye ka bonako, o se na dikgwetlho, mo mogaleng o o kgethegileng wa nako ya nnete. AudioWorklet ke fa enjene ya rona ya Chiptune3 e e dirang libopenmpt WASM e e kopantsweng, e sa itshetlehele mo mogaleng mogolo wa UI, e netefatsa gore modumo o tsamaya sentle go sa kgathalesege gore UI e dira eng.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Kholelo ya inthanete e e tlogetsweng ya mmino o o latelwang, e e nang le dimodule tse di fetang 150,000 go tswa go baopedi ba dikete go ralala masome a le mane a dingwaga. The Mod Archive ke yone fela motswedi wa mmino mo laeboraring ya rona mme ke setheo se se sa tlhatswiweng mo setšhabeng sa go latela.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Fomate e e tlhamilwe ke Karsten Obarski's Ultimate Soundtracker ka 1987, mme ya tlhabologa ka bonako mo demoscene — setso se se tseneletseng mo go sone ba ba dirang diporokeramo, ba ba opang mmino, le baaki ba gaisanang go dira ditiro tsa pono le mmino tse di gakgamatsang. Mo dingwageng tse dintsi, go tlhagile mefuta e mentsi ya difomate tsa tracker, mongwe le mongwe o sutisa melelwane ya se se neng se kgonega: dikanale tse dintsi, ditlamorago tse di botoka, didirisiwa tsa mmino tse di dirilweng, tshegetso ya VST plugin, le bokgoni jo bo feletseng jwa go kopanya mmino. Gompieno, lefelo la tracker le santse le dira mo lefatsheng lotlhe, mme mmino o mosha o ntse o gololwa letsatsi le letsatsi mo mafelong a jaaka The Mod Archive.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: E dirilwe ke banni ba OpenMPT. Laeborari ya tracker playback e e bulegileng, e e tshegetsang mefuta e e fetang 68 ya diforomo ka nepagalo e e sa tlwaelegang. Re fetotse khoutu ya C ya libopenmpt — ra oketsa waveform_processor e e tshwarang data ya PCM ya kanale nngwe le nngwe mo mixer pele ga puso ya bofelo — mme ra e kopanya go nna WebAssembly ka Emscripten. Kago ya rona ya WASM e e patched e emela binary e e tlhophilweng e e neng e tlamelwa le Chiptune3, e e thusang go nolofatsa di-oscilloscope tsa kanale nngwe le nngwe le go bopa motheo wa decoding wa mefuta yotlhe e e fetang 68.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: E dirilwe ke DrSnuggles — e buka ya JavaScript e e bulegileng e e dirang gore libopenmpt e dire ka AudioWorklet mo go tshamekeng diforomo tsa tracker tse di fetang 68 mo browsereng. Mo porojekeng eno, re fetotse processor ya AudioWorklet go ntsha data ya sebopego sa lekgetho la kanale nngwe le nngwe (e e thusang di-oscilloscope tsa dikhanale tse dintsi), ra tsenya taolo ya go oketsa modumo ka go itirang, ra ba ra nonotsha go tshwara dikgwetlho tsa go fetola dipina ka bonako. Chiptune3 e dira jaaka borokgo magareng ga Web Audio API ya browser le maatla a go rulaganya a kago ya rona ya libopenmpt e e patšhilweng, mme ke ene enjene e e tlhomameng e re e dirang jaaka tshwanelo.
tutorialStep1Filters: Sefeta ya Foreimeite — Tobetsa go bula grid ya go tlhopha tse dintsi ya diforeimeite tsotlhe tse di leng teng. Dirisa dikonopo tsa preset go tlhopha ka bonako ditlhopha: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 All (diforeimeite tse 56), kana All Supported.
Sefilô ya Dikanelo — Fokotsa ka palo ya dikanelo: dikanelo tse 4 (mekgwa ya MOD ya bogologolo), dikanelo tse 8, kgotsa dikanelo tse 8+ (mekgwa ya segompieno ya dikanelo tse dintsi).
Sefeta ya Bogolo — Sefeta ka bogolo jwa faele: e nnye (<100KB), e e fa gare, kgotsa e kgolo (>1MB).
Sefilwa la Lebitso la Tracker — Tlanya leina la tracker (mohlala, "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") go bona mmino o dirilweng ka software e e rileng.
Dikgetho tsa go dira ka thulaganyo — Lethathamo la dipina le rulaganye ka ID, setlhogo, leina la faele, bogolo, kgotsa letsatsi la diphetogo, ka go oketsega kgotsa go fokotsega.
Mokgatlho wa Mothopo — Fetola magareng ga Dipina Tsotlhe, Tse o di Ratang, le Hisetori ya go Tshameka.
tutorialStep2Details: Tshedimosetso ya Pina — Setlhogo, moopedi, sebopego, palo ya dikanale, le nomoro ya pina e bontshitswe kwa godimo ga dilaola tsa sebapadi.

Papatša/Pause & Tsamaiso — Konopo e kgolo ya papatša/pause e nang le kgetho ya mokgwa wa go tshameka: Tshameka ka go fapanya (random), Ka Thulaganyo (sequential), Pota E Nngwe, kana Ema Morago ga Ya Gompieno.
Pina e latelang — Tlolela pina e latelang ka seatla, kapa o e tlogelele mokgwa wa go tshameka o o o tlhophileng o e tshware.
Bolumo le Tswelelo — Fetola bolumo ka selaela, batla pina ka go tsamaisa, mme o bone nako e e fetileng/e e setseng.
Konopo ya go Rata — Tobetsa pelong go tsenya pina mo go tse o di ratang (e tlhoka akhaonto).
Download — Boloka faele ya tracker ya ntlha mo sesebedisweng sa gago.
Khokgolo ya ModArchive — Bula tsebe ya pina mo The Mod Archive go bona tshedimosetso e e oketsegileng le dikakgelo tsa setšhaba.

Mojule wa Tshedimosetso ya Pina — Leba tshedimosetso e e tlhalositsweng: leina la tracker, letlha, nako, mofuta wa container, dipina tse di kwa tlase, palo ya dikanale, didirisiwa, disampole, ditaelo, dipaterone, le molaetsa ope fela o o tsenngwang go tswa mo moopeding.
tutorialStep3Details: Pono ya Paterone — Bona datha ya paterone ya tracker e tsamaya ka nako ya nnete, e dirilwe ka WebGL gore e dire sentle. Khutlama nngwe le nngwe e emela kanale, mola o mongwe le o mongwe ke ketsahalo ya noto. Dino, didirisiwa, bolumo, le ditaelo tsa ditlamorago di bontshwa tsotlhe — fela jaaka mo mokwaloding wa tracker wa setso. Tobetsa toggle ya paterone go fetola magareng ga dipalo tse di emeng (twaelo) le tse di rapameng (skrine e e anameng).

Li-Oscilloscope tsa Channel ka nngwe — Ka fa tlase ga sebapadi, o tla bona letlapa la dipontsho tsa sebopeho sa lekgetho — e le nngwe mo channel e nngwe le e nngwe ya modumo mo pining. Di tsamaiswa ke processor ya sebopeho sa lekgetho sa C-level e e dirilweng ka tshwanelo e e agilweng mo libopenmpt, e e ntshang modumo wa channel ka nngwe pele ga motswako wa bofelo. Lebelela sebopeho sa lekgetho sa channel ka nngwe se ntse se tsamaya ka nako ya nnete, se go fa sesupo sa pono sa kagiso ya mmino — moropa wa kick mo channel 1, bass mo channel 2, lead mo channel 3, le tse dingwe.
Ditshwantsho tse pedi di ka bulwa/tswalwa mo Settings ka ntlha ya tiro kgotsa kgetho.
tutorialStep4Settings: Enjini ya go tshameka — Tlhola magareng ga BassoonTracker (classic MOD/XM), Chiptune3 (e e atlenegisitsweng, mefuta e e fetang 20), kgotsa FFmpeg (e e tshegetsang mefuta e mentsi ka go fetola mo servereng).

Setlhogo — Kgetha go tswa mo disetlhogong tsa mebala e le 16. Disetlhogo tse di lesedi di akaretsa Lesedi, Retro (Solarized), Ocean (Teal), Forest (Green), Strawberry (Pink), Blue, Pink, Cyan, Orange, le Gray. Disetlhogo tse di lefifi di akaretsa Lefifi, Midnight (Deep Purple), Golden (Black & Gold), Purple, Red, le Green.
Puo — Dipuo tsa sebopeho tse 52. Kgetho ya gago e bolokilwe mo lefelong.
Bolumo — Beaakanya maemo a bolumo ka tlwaelo mme o e pateletse mo pining nngwe le nngwe fa o batla.
Kganya ya Modumo e e Tlhomilweng — E fetola bolumo jwa go tshameka ka go iketsa gore o utlwe ka tsela e e tshwanang (e butswe ka tlwaelo).
Palo ya go dikologa ka go feta — Dipina tsa tracker gantsi di dikologa ka bosakhutleng. Bea palo ya go dikologa ka go feta go thibela go tshameka go sa fele (ka tlwaelo: 1).
Dikgogetša tša go Bontšha — Bontšha goba o fitiše pono ya sebaka, pono ya mohlala, le karolo ya matseno.
tutorialStep5Details: Ditiragatso — Atla pina efe epe go e boloka mo lenaneng la gago la ditiragatso, e e fihlelelang go tswa mo kgethong ya motswedi wa lenane la pina.
Hisitori ya go tshameka — Pina nngwe le nngwe e o e tshamekang e rekodiwa ka tlhoma. Tswelela hisitori ya gago go bona dipina tse o di tshamekileng.
Phatlalatso ya Didirisiwa tse di Farologaneng — Dikgatlhegelo tsa gago le hisetori di go sala morago mo didirisiweng tse di farologaneng fa o tsena.
Pori — Akhaonto e boloka fela tse di ratiwang le hisetori. Ga go na tshedimosetso ya botho e e kgobokantsweng kgotsa e e abelanweng.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: Laeborari ya difaele tsa mmino tsa tracker tse di fetang 135,400 tse di akaretsang diforomate tse di fetang 68, go tswa go di-MOD tsa 4-channel go ya go di-epics tsa 256-channel.
Mokgatlho wa di-engine tse tharo: BassoonTracker (JS ya bogologolo), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM), le FFmpeg (go fetola mo server) — e tlhophiwa ka go iketsetsa faele nngwe le nngwe.
Pono ya paterone ya tracker ya nako ya nnete e bontshitswe ka WebGL — lebelela dinoutso di kgwelela fela jaaka mo motlhamong wa tracker wa kgale.
Li-oscilloscope tsa maemo a kanale ka nngwe — bona tlhahiso ya modumo wa kanale ka nngwe e le leqhubu le tsamayang ka nako ya nnete, le tsamaisiwa ke go ntsha leqhubu ka mokgwa wa C.
Tlhagiso e e tsamayang le sekerini e e fetogang sentle mo sekerining sepe: desktop, tablet, kana founu — go akaretsa mokgwa wa paterone e e rapameng ya sekerini se se atlhameng.
16 mebala e e dirileng ka kelotlhoko ya mebala — go tswa mo leseding le le phepha go ya go bosigo jo bo tseneletseng, solarized retro, gouta e e bothitho, le tsotlhe tse di fa gare.
Diteme tsa puo tsa sebopeho tse 52 — go dira gore mmino wa tracker o kgone go dirisiwa ke baetsi ba lefatshe ka bophara.

Patlo ya go batla e e nonofileng, sefatlhego sa go tlhopha ka mokgwa o o farologaneng se se nang le dikonopo tse di tlhomilweng (Bassoon, Major Tracker, Chiptune3, All Supported), sefatlhego sa go tlhopha ka palo ya dikanale, le go rulaganya ka mafelo a a farologaneng.
Sisteme ya akhaonto e na le tse di ratiwang le hisetori ya go tshameka — kopanya laeborari ya gago mo didirisweng tsotlhe tsa gago.
Dikgokaganyo tsa pina tse di sa feleng tse di ka abelanwang — pina nngwe le nngwe e bona URL e e kgethegileng jaaka /song/123456/filename.mod.
Lata difaele tsa tracker tsa konokono kapa o fetolele go MP3 ka go tobetsa gangwe.
Phaenela ya tshedimosetso ya pina e bontsha metadata: setlhogo, moopedi, motlhatlheledi, sebopego, dikanale, didirisiwa, disampole, ditaelo, dipaterone, le molaetsa o keneng.
E gololesegwa ka botlalo, mohlodi o bulegileng, mme o tsamaisiwa ke setšhaba — ga go dipapatso, ga go go latela, ga go diphepa tsa tefo.

trackInfo.title: Setlhogo
trackInfo.noMeta: Ga go na metadata e e leng teng mo pina eno.
